title: Fixed Value Meter
description:
The Fixed Value Meter is suitable for consumers or producers with a constant power or flow rate during operation.
In this case, the function block can calculate the meter reading based on the switch-on duration.

inputs.description: If 1, the value of parameter (Pf) is set at the output (Pf), and the meter is running.
Pulse: Meter reading outputs are reset. On: Block is locked.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

properties.description: If checked, you will be notified if invalid Meter Reading values have been detected. For instance, when a physical counter sends unrealistic values due to transmission errors.
